button to display the dropdown menu. In that menu, select the kind of symbols you want to display in the view for the selected symbol. You can also choose the style in which the symbols can be displayed, i.e., tree-view or nested.</p></div></td></tr><tr><td class="highlight-#deebff" colspan="3" data-highlight-colour="#deebff"><div class="content-wrapper" title=""><p><strong>Style Sheets toolbar</strong></p></div></td></tr><tr><td><div class="content-wrapper"><p><ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="stylesheetsbutton.png" /></ac:image> Style Sheets</p></div></td><td><span>-</span></td><td><div class="content-wrapper"><p>Click to activate style sheets for the view or the entire project. <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Applying style sheets" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Learn more >>]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></p></div></td></tr><tr><td class="highlight-blue" colspan="3" data-highlight-colour="blue"><strong>Other buttons</strong></td></tr><tr><td><div class="content-wrapper"><p><ac:image ac:thumbnail="true" ac:alt="Back" ac:width="18"><ri:attachment ri:filename="back_diagram_toolbar.png" /></ac:image> Back</p></div></td><td>Alt+Left Arrow</td><td><p>Click to navigate to the previously opened view.</p></td></tr><tr><td><div class="content-wrapper"><p><ac:image ac:thumbnail="true" ac:alt="Forward" ac:width="20"><ri:attachment ri:filename="forward_diagram_toolbar.png" /></ac:image> Forward</p></div></td><td><p>Alt+Right Arrow</p></td><td><p>Click to navigate to the previously opened view.</p></td></tr></tbody></table><p class="auto-cursor-target"><br /></p>

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=289374218 space=SYSML2P version=14 -->
## PAGE 00716: SysML Constraints Suite

- page_id: `289374218`
- space_key: `SYSML2P`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/SYSML2P/pages/289374218/SysML+Constraints+Suite
- version_number: 14
- version_date: `2026-06-26T14:06:10.967+02:00`
- ancestors: SysML v2 Plugin Documentation > Model analysis > Validation > Predefined validation suites
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

The table below lists all the validation rules in the *SysMLConstraintsSuite*, along with their messages and [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Reviewing validation results' space=''].

References such as *$notVariantUsages* are used in messages to indicate elements referenced by the validation rule. In the tool, they are replaced with hyperlinks to the actual elements requiring your attention to resolve the validation failure.

| Validation rule | Validation rule message | Severity |
| --- | --- | --- |
| validateAttributeUsageFeatures | An attribute feature must be referential. Current non-referential feature(s): $featureList. | Error |
| validateAttributeDefinitionFeatures | An attribute feature must be referential. Current non-referential feature(s): $featureList. | Error |
| validateDefinitionVariationOwnedFeatureMembership | A variation must own only variants. Currently owned features that are not variants: $notVariantUsages. | Error |
| validateUsageVariationOwnedFeatureMembership | A variation must own only variants. Currently owned features that are not variants: $notVariantUsages. | Error |
| validateDefinitionVariationSpecialization | A variation must not specialize another variation. Currently specialized variation(s): $specializedVariationElements. | Error |
| validateUsageVariationSpecialization | A variation must not specialize another variation. Currently specialized variation(s): $specializedVariationElements. | Error |
| validateEventOccurrenceUsageReference | Must only reference an occurrence. Currently reference subsetted feature that is not an occurrence: $notOccurrenceReferences. | Error |
| validateExhibitStateUsageReference | Must only reference a state. Currently reference subsetted feature that is not a state: $notStateReferences. | Error |
| validatePerformActionUsageReference | Must only reference an action. Currently reference subsetted feature that is not an action: $notActionReferences. | Error |
| validateAssertConstraintUsageReference | Must only reference a constraint. Currently reference subsetted feature that is not a constraint: $notConstraintReferences. | Error |
| validateSatisfyRequirementUsageReference | Must only reference a requirement. Currently reference subsetted feature that is not a requirement: $notRequirementReferences. | Error |
| validateIncludeUseCaseUsageReference | Must only reference a use case. Currently reference subsetted feature that is not a use case: $notUseCaseReferences. | Error |
| validateRequirementDefinitionOnlyOneSubject | Only one subject is allowed. Current subjects: $subjectList. | Error |
| validateRequirementUsageOnlyOneSubject | Only one subject is allowed. Current subjects: $subjectList. | Error |
| validateCaseDefinitionOnlyOneObjective | Only one objective is allowed. Current objectives: $objectiveList. | Error |
| validateCaseUsageOnlyOneObjective | Only one objective is allowed. Current objectives: $objectiveList. | Error |
| validateCaseDefinitionOnlyOneSubject | Only one subject is allowed. Current subjects: $subjectList. | Error |
| validateCaseUsageOnlyOneSubject | Only one subject is allowed. Current subjects: $subjectList. | Error |
| validateViewDefinitionOnlyOneViewRendering | Only one renderer is allowed. Current renderers: $renderList. | Error |
| validateViewUsageOnlyOneViewRendering | Only one renderer is allowed. Current renderers: $renderList. | Error |
| validateEventOccurrenceUsageReference | Must only reference an occurrence. Currently reference subsetted feature that is not an occurrence: $notOccurrenceReference. | Error |
| validateExhibitStateUsageReference | Must only reference a state. Currently reference subsetted feature that is not a state: $notStateReference. | Error |
| validatePerformActionUsageReference | Must only reference an action. Currently reference subsetted feature that is not an action: $notActionReference. | Error |
| validateAssertConstraintUsageReference | Must only reference a constraint. Currently reference subsetted feature that is not an action: $notConstraintReference. | Error |
| validateSatisfyRequirementUsageReference | Must only reference a requirement. Currently reference subsetted feature that is not a requirement: $notRequirementReference. | Error |
| validateIncludeUseCaseUsageReference | Must only reference a use case. Currently reference subsetted feature that is not a use case: $notUseCaseReference. | Error |
| validateDefinitionVariationOwnedFeatureMembership | A variation must own only variants. Currently owned features that are not variants: $notVariantUsages. | Error |
| validateUsageVariationOwnedFeatureMembership | A variation must own only variants. Currently owned features that are not variants: $notVariantUsages. | Error |
| validateDefinitionVariationSpecialization | A variation must not specialize another variation. Currently specialized variation(s): $specializedVariationElements. | Error |
| validateUsageVariationSpecialization | A variation must not specialize another variation. Currently specialized variation(s): $specializedVariationElements. | Error |
| validateViewRenderingMembershipOwningType | Must be owned by a view. Currently owned by: $owningType. | Error |
| validateActorMembershipOwningType | Must be owned by a requirement or a case. Currently owned by: $owningType. | Error |
| validateSubjectMembershipOwningType | Must be owned by a requirement or a case. Currently owned by: $owningType. | Error |
| validateStateSubactionMembershipOwningType | Must be owned by a state. Currently owned by: $owningType. | Error |
| validateStakeholderMembershipOwningType | Must be owned by a requirement. Currently owned by: $owningType. | Error |
| validateRequirementConstraintMembershipOwningType | Must be owned by a requirement. Currently owned by: $owningType. | Error |
| validateRequirementVerificationMembershipOwningType | Must be a requirement owned by an objective. Currently owned by: $owningType. | Error |
| validateObjectiveMembershipOwningType | Must be owned by a case. Currently owned by: $owningType. | Error |
| validateWhileLoopActionUsage | Must own at least two parameters. | Error |
| validateSendActionParameters | Must own at least three parameters. | Error |
| validateAcceptActionUsageParameters | Must own at least one parameter. | Error |
| validateIfActionUsageParameters | Must own at least two parameters. | Error |
| validateForLoopActionUsageParameters | Must own exactly two parameters. Currently owned parameter(s): $parameterList.ConditionWhen there are more than 2 parameters. | Error |
| Must own exactly two parameters.ConditionWhen there are fewer than 2 parameters. |  |  |
| validateUsageVariationIsAbstract | Variation usage must be abstract. | Error |
| validateUsageIsReferential | Directed, end, or untyped usage must be referential. | Error |
| validateRequirementConstraintMembershipIsComposite | Must be composite. | Error |
| validateReferenceUsageIsReference | Must be referential. | Error |
| validatePortUsageNestedUsagesNotComposite | An owned usage that is not a port must be referential. Currently owned usages that are neither ports nor referential: $nonReferentialNotPortUsages. | Error |
| validatePortDefinitionOwnedUsagesNotComposite | An owned usage that is not a port must be referential. Currently owned usages that are neither ports nor referential: $nonReferentialNotPortUsages. | Error |
| validatePortUsageIsReference | Port not owned by another port must be referential. | Error |
| validateControlNodeIsComposite | Must be composite. | Error |
| validateAttributeUsageIsReference | Must be referential. | Error |
| validateEventOccurrenceUsageIsReference | Must be referential. | Error |
| validateTransitionUsageParameters | Must own at least one input parameter.ConditionWhen triggerAction is empty. | Error |
| Must own at least two input parameters.ConditionWhen triggerAction is not empty. |  |  |
| validateStateUsageStateSubactionKind | Only one owned 'entry' action is allowed. Currently owned 'entry' actions: $entryActions.ConditionWhen there is more than one 'entry' action. | Error |
| Only one owned 'do' action is allowed. Currently owned 'do' actions: $doActions.ConditionWhen there is more than one 'do' action. |  |  |
| Only one owned 'exit' action is allowed. Currently owned 'exit' actions: $exitActions.ConditionWhen there is more than one 'exit' action. |  |  |
| validateStateDefinitionStateSubactionKind | Only one owned 'entry' action is allowed. Currently owned 'entry' actions: $entryActions.ConditionWhen there is more than one 'entry' action. | Error |
| Only one owned 'do' action is allowed. Currently owned 'do' actions: $doActions.ConditionWhen there is more than one 'do' action. |  |  |
| Only one owned 'exit' action is allowed. Currently owned 'exit' actions: $exitActions.ConditionWhen there is more than one 'exit' action. |  |  |
| validatePartUsagePartDefinition | Must be typed by at least one part definition. | Error |
| validateConjugatedPortDefinitionConjugatedPortDefinitionIsEmpty | Must not own any conjugated port definitions. Currently conjugated port definitions: $conjugatedPortDefinitions. | Error |
| validateFlowDefinitionFlowEnds | Must not have more than two ends. Current ends: $ends. | Error |
| validateConnectionDefinitionIsSufficient | Must be sufficient. | Error |
| validateCaseDefinitionSubjectParameterPosition | The subject must be the first parameter. Current first parameter: $currentFirstParameter. | Error |
| validateCaseUsageSubjectParameterPosition | The subject must be the first parameter. Current first parameter: $currentFirstParameter. | Error |
| validateRequirementDefinitionSubjectParameterPosition | The subject must be the first parameter. Current first parameter: $currentFirstParameter. | Error |
| validateRequirementUsageSubjectParameterPosition | The subject must be the first parameter. Current first parameter: $currentFirstParameter. | Error |
| validateForLoopActionUsageLoopVariable | The first owned feature must be a reference usage. Current first owned feature: $currentFirstParameter. | Error |
| validateDefinitionVariationIsAbstract | A variation must be abstract. | Error |
| validateEnumerationDefinitionIsVariation | Must be a variation. | Error |
| validateExposeOwningNamespace | Must be owned by a view usage. | Error |
| validateExposeVisibility | Must have protected visibility. | Error |
| validateExposeIsImportAll | An expose relationship always imports all elements, regardless of visibility. | Error |
| validateFramedConcernMembershipConstraintKind | A framed concern membership must have a 'requirement' kind. | Error |
| validateRequirementVerificationMembershipKind | A requirement verification membership must have a 'requirement' kind. | Error |
| validateOccurrenceUsageIsPortion | An occurrence with a portion kind must be a portion. | Error |
| validateVariantMembershipOwningNamespace | The owning namespace of a variant membership must be a variation-point definition or usage. Current namespace: $namespace. | Error |
| validateTransitionFeatureMembershipOwningType | The owning type of a transition feature membership must be a transition usage. Current owning type: $owningType. | Error |
| validateDecisionNodeIncomingSuccessions | A decide may have at most one incoming succession. Currently has: $successions. | Error |
| validateForkNodeIncomingSuccessions | A fork may have at most one incoming succession. Currently has: $successions. | Error |
| validateJoinNodeOutgoingSuccessions | A join may have at most one outgoing succession. Currently has: $successions. | Error |
| validateMergeNodeOutgoingSuccessions | A merge may have at most one outgoing succession. Currently has: $successions. | Error |
| validateControlNodeOwningType | Must be owned by an action. | Error |
| validateAssignmentActionUsage | The target of an assignment action must be able to have time-varying values. Current target: $target. | Error |
| validateAssignmentActionUsageReferent | An assignment action must reference a feature as its target. Current target: $referent. | Error |
| validateConjugatedPortDefinitionOriginalPortDefinition | A conjugated port definition must reference the same original port definition as its port conjugator. Current conjugator: $portConjugator. | Error |
| validateStateUsageParallelSubactions | A parallel state cannot own successions or transitions. | Error |
| validateStateDefinitionParallelSubactions | A parallel state cannot own successions or transitions. | Error |
| validateTransitionFeatureMembershipEffectAction | A transition feature whose kind is 'effect' must be an action usage. | Error |
| validateTransitionFeatureMembershipGuardExpression | A transition feature whose kind is 'guard' must be an expression whose result is Boolean with multiplicity 1..1. | Error |
| validateTransitionFeatureMembershipTriggerAction | A transition feature whose kind is 'trigger' must be an accept action usage. | Error |
| validateObjectiveMembershipIsComposite | Must be composite. | Error |
| validateOccurrenceUsageIndividualDefinition | An occurrence usage must be typed by at most one individual occurrence definition. Currently typed by: $IndividualDefinitions. | Error |
| validateOccurrenceUsageIndividualUsage | An individual occurrence usage must be typed by an individual occurrence definition. Currently typed by: $definitions. | Error |
| validateOccurrenceUsagePortionKind | An occurrence usage with a portion kind must be owned by an occurrence definition or another occurrence usage. Current owning type is $owningType. | Error |
| validateCrossSubsettingCrossedFeature | The crossed feature must define exactly two chaining features, and their order must match the crossed end features. Current chaining features: $chainingFeatures. | Error |
| validateRedefinitionDirectionConformance | Direction must conform to the direction of the redefined feature. Currently redefined feature: $redefinedFeature. | Error |
| validateRedefinitionFeaturingTypes | A package-level feature cannot be redefined. Currently redefined feature: $redefinedFeature. ConditionWhen a package-level feature is redefined. | Error |
| A feature cannot redefine another feature within the same type. Currently redefined feature: $redefinedFeatures.ConditionWhen the redefining and the redefined features are owned by the same type. |  |  |
| validateSubsettingFeaturingTypes | The feature cannot access a subsetted feature. Tip: use dot notation for nesting. Non-accessible feature: $subsettedFeature. | Error |
| validateRedefinitionEndConformance | A non-end feature cannot redefine an end feature. Currently redefined end feature: $redefinedFeatures. | Error |
| validateSubsettingUniquenessConformance | A non-unique feature cannot subset a unique feature. Currently subsetted unique feature: $subsettedFeatures. | Error |
| validateSubsettingConstantConformance | A variable feature cannot subset a constant feature. Currently subsetted constant feature: $subsetedFeatures. | Error |
| validateFeatureValueOverriding | Cannot override a non-default value - the redefined feature already has a non-default value. Redefined feature(s): $redefinedFeatures. | Error |
| validateTypeOwnedMultiplicity | Only one multiplicity is allowed. Current multiplicities: $multiplicityRange. | Error |
| validateFlowPayloadFeature | Only one payload is allowed. Current payloads: $payloadFeatures. | Error |
| validateFeatureValueOverriding | Cannot override a non-default value – the redefined feature already has a non-default value. Redefined feature(s): $redefinedFeatures. | Error |
| validateReturnParameterMembershipOwningType | Must be owned by a calculation or a constraint. Currently owned by: $owningType. | Error |
| validateResultExpressionMembershipOwningType | Must be owned by a calculation or a constraint. Currently owned by: $owningType. | Error |
| validateFlowEndOwningType | Must be owned by a flow. Currently owned by: $owningType. | Error |
| validateStructureSpecialization | A structure must not specialize a behavior. Currently specialized behavior(s): $specializedBehavior. | Error |
| validateBehaviorSpecialization | A behavior must not specialize a structure. Currently specialized structure(s): $specializedStructure. | Error |
| validateSpecificationSpecificNotConjugated | A conjugated type cannot specialize another type. Currently specialized type(s): $generalType. | Error |
| validateTypeAtMostOneConjugator | Only one conjugation relationship is allowed. Current conjugation relationship(s): $ConjugationRelationships. | Error |
| validatePortDefinitionConjugatedPortDefinition | Only one owned conjugated port definition is allowed. Currently owned conjugated port definition(s): $ConjugationPortDefinitions.ConditionWhen there is more than 1 owned conjugated part definition. | Error |
| Must own a conjugated port definition.ConditionWhen there are no owned conjugated port definitions. |  |  |
| validateExpressionResultExpressionMembership | Only one expression is allowed. Current expressions: $expressionList. | Error |
| validateFunctionResultExpressionMembership | Only one expression is allowed. Current expressions: $expressionList. | Error |
| validateFeatureValueIsInitial | A non-variable feature cannot have an initial feature value. | Error |
| validateFlowEndNestedFeature | Only one owned feature is allowed. Current owned features: $ownedFeatureList.ConditionWhen there is more than one owned feature. | Error |
| Must own one feature.ConditionWhen there are no owned features. |  |  |
| validateAssociationBinarySpecialization | An association with more than two ends must not specialize $binaryLink. | Error |
| validateConnectorBinarySpecialization | A connector with more than two ends must not specialize $binaryLink. | Error |
| validateAssociationRelatedTypes | Not abstract association must have at least two related types. | Error |
| validateConnectorRelatedFeatures | Not abstract connector must have at least two related features. | Error |
| validateAssociationEndTypes | An end feature must have exactly one type. Current types: $types. | Error |
| validateBindingConnectorIsBinary | Must have exactly two related features. Current related features: $ends. | Error |
| validateEndFeatureMembershipIsEnd | Must be an end feature. | Error |
| validateFlowEndIsEnd | Must be an end feature. | Error |
| validateFeatureEndNoDirection | An end feature must not have a direction. | Error |
| validateFeatureEndIsConstant | An end feature that is variable must also be constant. | Error |
| validateFeatureEndNotDerivedAbstractCompositeOrPortion | An end feature must not be derived, abstract, composite, or have a portion kind value. | Error |
| validateImportTopLevelVisibility | A top-level import must have private visibility. | Error |
| validateExpressionResultParameterMembership | Must own exactly one result. Currently owned results: $results. | Error |
| ValidateFunctionResultParameterMembership | Must own exactly one result. Currently owned results: $results. | Error |
| validateFeaturePortionNotVariable | A feature with portion kind must not be variable. | Error |
| validateClassifierMultiplicityDomain | A multiplicity owned by a classifier must not have any featuring types. | Error |
| validateFeatureMultiplicityDomain | A multiplicity owned by a feature must have a featuring type the same as the feature itself. | Error |
| validateMultiplicityRangeBounds | The lower bound (if any) and upper bound expressions must be the first owned members. Currently owned members before bounds: $ownedMembers. | Error |
| validateMultiplicityRangeBoundResultTypes | Multiplicity range bounds must be integer-valued and non-negative when evaluable. | Error |
| validateDataTypeSpecialization | A data type must not specialize a class or an association. Currently specialized class(es) and/or association(s): $specializedClassAssociation. | Error |
| validateClassSpecialization | A classifier must not specialize a data type or an association. Currently specialized data type(s) and/or association(s): $specializedDataTypeAssociation. | Error |
| validateFeatureChainingFeatureConformance | $chainingFeature must be featured within $previousChainingFeature. | Error |
| validateFeatureChainingFeatureNotOne | A feature must have either no chaining features or more than one. | Error |
| validateFeatureChainingFeaturesNotSelf | A feature cannot be one of its own chaining features. | Error |
| validateFeatureConstantIsVariable | A constant feature must be variable. | Error |
| validateFeatureIsVariable | A variable feature must directly or indirectly specialize Occurrences::Occurrence. | Error |
| validateFeatureValueIsInitial | A non-variable feature cannot have an initial feature value. | Error |
| validateCollectExpressionOperator | The operator must be 'collect'. Current operator: '$operator'. | Error |
| validateFeatureChainExpressionOperator | The operator must be '.'. Current operator: '$operator'. | Error |
| validateIndexExpressionOperator | The operator must be '#'. Current operator: '$operator'. | Error |
| validateSelectExpressionOperator | The operator must be 'select'. Current operator: '$operator'. | Error |
| validateInstantiationExpressionInstantiatedType | An instantiation expression must have an instantiated type. | Error |
| validateParameterMembershipParameterDirection | The member of a parameter membership must have the '$expectedDirection' direction. Current direction: '$memberDirection'. | Error |
| validateParameterMembershipOwningType | The owning type of a parameter membership must be a behavior, step, or result parameter of a constructor expression. Current owning type: $owningType. | Error |
| validateInstantiationExpressionResult | An expression must own its result parameter. | Error |
| validateFeatureReferenceExpressionResult | An expression must own its result parameter. | Error |
| validateAnnotationAnnotatedElementOwnership | An annotation must own its annotating element if and only if it is owned by the annotated element. | Error |
| validateAnnotationAnnotatingElement | An annotation must own its annotating element or be owned by one, but not both. | Error |
| validateConstructorExpressionNoDuplicateFeatureRedefinition | A constructor expression must not redefine the same feature more than once. Current features redefined more than once: $redefinedFeatures. | Error |
| validateConstructorExpressionOwnedFeatures | A constructor expression must not own any features other than its result. Currently owned features other than the result: $ownedFeatures. | Error |
| validateElementFilterMembershipConditionIsBoolean | A condition result must directly or indirectly specialize ScalarValues::Boolean. | Error |
| validateFeatureReferenceExpressionReferentIsFeature | The first non-parameter owned member must be a feature.Current first owned member: $firstMember. | Error |
| validateInvocationExpressionInstantiatedType | The instantiated type of an invocation expression must be a behavior or a feature typed by exactly one behavior. Current instantiated type(s): $instantiatedTypes. | Error |
| validateInvocationExpressionOwnedFeatures | All owned features of an invocation expression, other than its result, must have the 'in' direction. Currently owned features with other directions: $ownedFeaturesWithoutInDirection. | Error |
| validateInvocationExpressionParameterRedefinition | Each input parameter of an invocation expression must redefine exactly one input parameter of its instantiated type. Input parameters with zero or multiple redefinitions: $inputParameters. | Error |
| validateFeatureEndMultiplicity | End feature must have a multiplicity of [1]. | Error |
| validateFeatureOwnedReferenceSubsetting | Only one reference subsetting (::>) is allowed. Current reference subsetting: $referenceSubsettedList. | Error |
| validateFeatureOwnedCrossSubsetting | Only one cross subsetting (=>) is allowed. Current cross subsettings: $crossSubsettedList. | Error |
| validateRedefinitionEndConformance | A non-end feature cannot redefine an end feature. Currently redefined end feature: $redefinedFeatures. | Error |
| validateSubsettingUniquenessConformance | A non-unique feature cannot subset a unique feature. Currently subsetted unique feature: $subsettedFeatures. | Error |
| validateSubsettingConstantConformance | A variable feature cannot subset a constant feature. Currently subsetted constant feature: $subsetedFeatures. | Error |
| validateInvocationExpressionInstantiatedType | The instantiated type of an invocation expression must be a behavior or a feature typed by exactly one behavior. Current instantiated type(s): $instantiatedTypes. | Error |
| validateInvocationExpressionOwnedFeatures | All owned features of an invocation expression, other than its result, must have the 'in' direction. Currently owned features with other directions: $ownedFeaturesWithoutInDirection. | Error |
| validateInvocationExpressionParameterRedefinition | Each input parameter of an invocation expression must redefine exactly one input parameter of its instantiated type. Input parameters with zero or multiple redefinitions: $inputParameters. | Error |
| validateInvocationExpressionNoDuplicateParameterRedefinition | An invocation expression must not have multiple owned features redefining the same feature of its instantiated type. Current duplicate redefinitions: $duplicateRedefinedFeatures redefines $redefinedFeature. | Error |
| validateMetadataFeatureBody | A metadata feature must be unnamed, redefine exactly one feature, have only model-level evaluable values, and only own features with the same restrictions. Invalid feature(s) of metadata: $InvalidFeaturesOfMetadata. | Error |
| validateMetadataFeatureAnnotatedElement | Must annotate an element whose metaclass is $AllowedMetaclasses.ConditionThere is only one ref element that subsets/redefines annotatedElement in the metadata definition. | Error |
| Must annotate an element whose metaclass is one of: $AllowedMetaclasses.ConditionThere are multiple ref elements that subset annotatedElement in the metadata definition. |  |  |
| Non-matching annotated element(s): $NonMatchingElement.ConditionThe same metadata usage annotates multiple elements. |  |  |
| validateMetadataAccessExpressionReferencedElement | A metadata access expression must have at least one member that is not owned by a feature membership. | Error |
| validateMetadataFeatureMetaclass | A metadata feature must be typed by exactly one metaclass. Currently typed by: $types. | Error |
| validateMetadataFeatureMetaclassNotAbstract | A metadata feature must be typed by a non-abstract metaclass. Currently typed by: $type. | Error |
| validateCrossSubsettingCrossingFeature | The crossing feature must be an end feature owned by a type with at least two end features. | Error |
| validateFeatureCrossFeatureSpecialization | The owned cross feature must specialize the cross features of all redefined features. | Error |
| validateFeatureCrossFeatureType | The owned cross feature must have the same types as this feature.Feature type(s): $featureType. Cross feature type(s): $crossFeatureTypes. | Error |
| validateFeatureChainExpressionConformance | The target feature $targetFeature must be featured within $argumentResult. | Error |

### EXACT CONFLUENCE STORAGE SOURCE

Currently reference subsetted feature that is not a requirement: $notRequirementReferences.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateIncludeUseCaseUsageReference</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must only reference a use case. Current subjects: $subjectList.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateRequirementUsageOnlyOneSubject</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Only one subject is allowed. Current subjects: $subjectList.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateCaseDefinitionOnlyOneObjective</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Only one objective is allowed. Current objectives: $objectiveList.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateCaseUsageOnlyOneObjective</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Only one objective is allowed. Current objectives: $objectiveList.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td><p>validateCaseDefinitionOnlyOneSubject</p></td><td>Only one subject is allowed. Current subjects: $subjectList.<span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><br /></span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td><p>validateCaseUsageOnlyOneSubject</p></td><td>Only one subject is allowed. Current subjects: $subjectList.</td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateViewDefinitionOnlyOneViewRendering</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Only one renderer is allowed. Current renderers: $renderList.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateViewUsageOnlyOneViewRendering</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Only one renderer is allowed. Current renderers: $renderList.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateEventOccurrenceUsageReference</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must only reference an occurrence. Currently reference subsetted feature that is not an occurrence: $notOccurrenceReference.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateExhibitStateUsageReference</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must only reference a state. Currently reference subsetted feature that is not a state: $notStateReference.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validatePerformActionUsageReference</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><span>Must only reference an action. Currently reference subsetted feature that is not an action: $notConstraintReference.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateSatisfyRequirementUsageReference</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must only reference a requirement. Currently reference subsetted feature that is not a use case: $notUseCaseReference.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateDefinitionVariationOwnedFeatureMembership</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">A variation must own only variants. Currently owned features that are not variants: $notVariantUsages.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateUsageVariationOwnedFeatureMembership</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">A variation must own only variants. Currently owned features that are not variants: $notVariantUsages.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateDefinitionVariationSpecialization</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><span>A variation must not specialize another variation. Currently specialized variation(s): $specializedVariationElements.</span></span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateUsageVariationSpecialization</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><span>A variation must not specialize another variation. Currently specialized variation(s): $specializedVariationElements.</span></span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateViewRenderingMembershipOwningType</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must be owned by a view. Currently owned by: $owningType.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateActorMembershipOwningType</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must be owned by a requirement or a case. Currently owned by: $owningType.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateSubjectMembershipOwningType</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must be owned by a requirement or a case. Currently owned by: $owningType.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateStateSubactionMembershipOwningType</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must be owned by a state. Currently owned by: $owningType.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateStakeholderMembershipOwningType</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must be owned by a requirement. Currently owned by: $owningType.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateRequirementConstraintMembershipOwningType</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must be owned by a requirement. Currently owned by: $owningType.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td><span>validateRequirementVerificationMembershipOwningType</span></td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must be a requirement owned by an objective. Currently owned by: $owningType.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateObjectiveMembershipOwningType</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must be owned by a case. Currently owned by: $owningType.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateWhileLoopActionUsage</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must own at least two parameters.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateSendActionParameters</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must own at least three parameters.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateAcceptActionUsageParameters</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must own at least one parameter.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateIfActionUsageParameters</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must own at least two parameters.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td rowspan="2">validateForLoopActionUsageParameters</td><td><div class="content-wrapper"><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must own exactly two parameters. Currently owned parameter(s): $parameterList.</span></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="65307ed5-23fa-45e5-b942-d1cc480d5fcf"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Condition</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">When there are more than 2 parameters.</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></div></td><td rowspan="2">Error</td></tr><tr><td><div class="content-wrapper"><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must own exactly two parameters.</span></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="0a0b25cb-5fec-4c09-b222-1c9b4e60e304"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Condition</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">When there are fewer than 2 parameters.</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></div></td></tr><tr><td>validateUsageVariationIsAbstract</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Variation usage must be abstract.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateUsageIsReferential</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Directed, end, or untyped usage must be referential.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateRequirementConstraintMembershipIsComposite</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must be composite.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateReferenceUsageIsReference</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must be referential. </span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">validatePortUsageNestedUsagesNotComposite<br /></span></td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">An owned usage that is not a port must be referential. Currently owned usages that are neither ports nor referential: $nonReferentialNotPortUsages.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">validatePortDefinitionOwnedUsagesNotComposite</span></td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">An owned usage that is not a port must be referential. Currently owned usages that are neither ports nor referential: $nonReferentialNotPortUsages.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validatePortUsageIsReference</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Port not owned by another port must be referential.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateControlNodeIsComposite</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must be composite.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateAttributeUsageIsReference</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must be referential. </span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateEventOccurrenceUsageIsReference</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must be referential. </span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td rowspan="2">validateTransitionUsageParameters</td><td><div class="content-wrapper"><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must own at least one input parameter.</span></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="b913dea1-791d-45de-9350-d891391fe983"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Condition</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">When triggerAction is empty.</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></div></td><td rowspan="2">Error</td></tr><tr><td><div class="content-wrapper"><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must own at least two input parameters.</span></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="216a2b23-aa13-408b-9804-8dd98fb3e9b4"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Condition</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">When triggerAction is not empty.</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></div></td></tr><tr><td rowspan="3">validateStateUsageStateSubactionKind</td><td><div class="content-wrapper"><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Only one owned 'entry' action is allowed. Currently owned 'entry' actions: $entryActions.</span></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="147e17d1-5013-46aa-ba7d-2ac60d8faea1"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Condition</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">When there is more than one 'entry' action.</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></div></td><td rowspan="3">Error</td></tr><tr><td><div class="content-wrapper"><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Only one owned 'do' action is allowed. Currently owned 'do' actions: $doActions.</span></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="f4d03e99-2433-42e7-a814-e84a3681f506"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Condition</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">When there is more than one 'do' action.</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></div></td></tr><tr><td><div class="content-wrapper"><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Only one owned 'exit' action is allowed. Currently owned 'exit' actions: $exitActions.</span></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="401d62c0-c69d-4521-b5c4-b64f02b30745"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Condition</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">When there is more than one 'exit' action.</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></div></td></tr><tr><td rowspan="3">validateStateDefinitionStateSubactionKind</td><td><div class="content-wrapper"><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Only one owned 'entry' action is allowed. Currently owned 'entry' actions: $entryActions.</span></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="643f787e-7038-4a80-9fc2-6cefcf9f79d8"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Condition</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">When there is more than one 'entry' action.</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></div></td><td rowspan="3">Error</td></tr><tr><td><div class="content-wrapper"><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Only one owned 'do' action is allowed. Currently owned 'do' actions: $doActions.</span></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="9e010112-29cb-4c40-bf16-22093aa6f5b4"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Condition</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">When there is more than one 'do' action.</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></div></td></tr><tr><td><div class="content-wrapper"><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Only one owned 'exit' action is allowed. Currently owned 'exit' actions: $exitActions.</span></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="76b6d8bf-c42a-4da0-8d37-441d3bee5490"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Condition</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">When there is more than one 'exit' action.</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></div></td></tr><tr><td>validatePartUsagePartDefinition</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must be typed by at least one part definition.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateConjugatedPortDefinitionConjugatedPortDefinitionIsEmpty</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must not own any conjugated port definitions. Currently conjugated port definitions: $conjugatedPortDefinitions.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateFlowDefinitionFlowEnds</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must not have more than two ends. Current ends: $ends.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateConnectionDefinitionIsSufficient</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Must be sufficient.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td>validateCaseDefinitionSubjectParameterPosition</td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">The subject must be the first parameter. Current first parameter: $currentFirstParameter.</span></td><td>Error</td></tr><tr><td><p>validateCaseUsageSubjectParameterPosition</p></td><td><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">The subject must be the first parameter.
