style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">     </span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">entry</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">     </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">then</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">off</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">     </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">state</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">off</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">     </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">transition</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">off_to_starting</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">first</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">off</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">then</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">starting</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">     </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">state</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">starting</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">     </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">transition</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">starting_to_on</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">first</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">starting</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">then</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">     </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">state</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">     </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">transition</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on_to_off</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">first</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">then</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">off</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;    <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// named transition</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">     <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// OR</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">     </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">transition</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">first</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">then</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">off</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;                   <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// unnamed transition</span></span></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">}</span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">------------ </span>Shorthand transition declaration</span></span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">state</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">VehicleStates</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">      </span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">entry</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">      </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">then</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">off</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">      </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">state</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">off</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">; </span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">      </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">then</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">starting</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;     <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// this transition's source is the lexically previous state 'off'</span></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">      </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">state</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">starting</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">; </span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">      </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">then</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;             <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// this transition's source is the lexically previous state 'starting'</span></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">      </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">state</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">; </span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">      </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">then</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">off</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;            <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// this transition's source is the lexically previous state 'on'</span></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h4>Creating transitions via the smart manipulator in a view</h4><p>To create transitions via the smart manipulator in a view</p><hr /><ol><li>In a view, select a state symbol, and in its smart manipulator, click the <strong>transition </strong>command.</li><li>Click on the target element. A transition usage is created between the elements.</li><li>Specify the transition features.</li></ol><h4>Creating transitions via the view palette</h4><p>To create transitions via the view palette</p><hr /><ol><li>In the view palette, under the States group, click the<span> <strong>transition </strong></span><span>button to create a transition usage.</span></li><li>In a view, click on the source element symbol, then click on the target element symbol. A transition usage is created between the elements.</li><li>Specify the transition features.</li></ol><h3>Specifying transitions</h3><h4>Specifying triggers for transitions via the Textual Editor</h4><p>A transition usage can also have a trigger, which is an accept action usage used to trigger the transition. <span style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;">It may have payload and receiver parameters, accepting the transfer of a payload received by the given receiver. </span><span style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;">A payload parameter can also include a feature value to only accept the value that is the result of the feature value expression.</span></p><p>To specify triggers for transitions via the Textual Editor</p><hr /><ol><li>In the Textual Editor, place the cursor between the transition's source and target, before the guard condition, then declare the <em>accept</em> keyword.<br /><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="a6694222-7f26-4a85-8e7b-d767730928d4"><ac:rich-text-body><p>Transition usages from the entry action are not allowed to have accepters.</p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></li><li>Follow the keyword with any of the needed options: <ol><li>Specify a payload parameter.<ol><li>Specify a feature value of a payload parameter:<ol><li>A change trigger with the keyword <em>when</em> followed by an expression whose result must be a Boolean value.</li><li>An absolute time trigger with the keyword <em>at </em>followed by an expression whose result must be a TimeInstantValue.</li><li>A relative time trigger with the keyword <em>after</em> followed by an expression whose result must be a DurationValue.</li></ol></li></ol></li><li>Identify a transfer receiver parameter with the keyword <em>via</em>.<ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="23ae8d5b-dbca-43f3-b958-1a2cd0622d3c"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Accepting context</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><ul><li>When an accept action usage is a composite feature of a part definition or usage, then the default for the receiver (<em>via</em>) of the accept action usage is the containing part, not the accept action itself. </li><li>Otherwise, the accepting context is the highest level containing action usage. </li><li>When accepting through a port, the port usage is the receiver (<em>via</em>).</li></ul></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></li></ol></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the </span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="74662899-dd33-4805-980b-404d1c99fce6"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">transition</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on_off</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">first</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">accept</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">TurnOff</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">via</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">commPort</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">then</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">off</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">; <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// unnamed payload parameter with the transfer receiver parameter</span></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">transition</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on_off</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">first</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">accept</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">turnOff</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">TurnOff</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">via</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">commPort</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">then</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">off</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">; <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// named payload parameter with the transfer receiver parameter</span></span></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">transition</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on_off</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">first</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">accept</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">TurnOff </span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">when</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">normalTemp</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> &gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">maxTemp</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">then</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">off</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">; </span><span style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// change trigger feature value of a payload parameter</span></span><br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">transition</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on_off</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">first</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">accept</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">TurnOff </span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">at</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">maintenanceTime</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">then <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">off</span></span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">; </span><span style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// absolute time trigger feature value of a payload parameter</span></span><br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">transition</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on_off</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">first</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">accept</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">TurnOff </span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">after</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-green-bolder,#1f845a);">50</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> [</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">min</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><u>]</u> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">then</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">off</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">; </span><span style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// relative time trigger feature value of a payload parameter</span></span></span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h4>Specifying triggers for transitions via the Drag and Drop handler in a view</h4><p>To specify triggers for transitions via the Drag and Drop handler in a view</p><hr /><ul><li data-uuid="375655ca-0eaa-44be-9559-ff85e002f387">Drag and drop an element from the Containment tree or use its symbol's <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Drag and Drop handler" /></ac:link> on a transition path executing the <strong>Set Trigger </strong>command.</li></ul><h4><span>Specifying triggers for transitions via the Specification panel</span></h4><p>To specify triggers for transitions via the Specification panel</p><hr /><ul><li data-uuid="b830b7f7-e6cb-4e80-a074-9e8c6baf3c01">Drag and drop an element from the Containment tree or use its symbol's <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Drag and Drop handler" /></ac:link> and drop it on the<span> <strong>Trigger</strong></span><strong><span> </span></strong>field in the Properties section of the Specification panel for the transition element. </li></ul><h4>Specifying guard conditions for transitions via the Textual Editor</h4><p>The<strong> </strong>transition usage can contain a guard condition, which is a Boolean expression that must evaluate to <em>true </em>for the transition to fire. </p><p>To specify guard conditions for transitions via the Textual Editor</p><hr /><ol><li><p class="auto-cursor-target">In the Textual Editor, place the cursor between the transition's source and target, after the accepter, then declare the needed keyword:</p><ol><li><p class="auto-cursor-target"><em>if</em> - the specified guard expression must evaluate to <em>true</em> for the transition to occur.</p></li><li><em>if not </em>- the specified guard expression must evaluate to <em>false</em> for the transition to occur. </li></ol></li><li><p class="auto-cursor-target">Follow the keyword with the guard expression.</p></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the </span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="d297bbee-9a34-46ce-9e00-8c715472d3a9"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">transition</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">init</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">if</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">isInitOff</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">then</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">off</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// 'if isInitOff' specifies a guard condition which must evaluate to true for the transition to occur</span></span></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">transition</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">init</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">if</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">not</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">isInitOff</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">then</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// 'if not isInitOff' specifies a guard condition which must evaluate to false for the transition to occur</span></span></span></span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h4>Specifying effect actions for transitions via the Textual Editor</h4><p>A transition usage can have an effect action, which is performed if the transition usage is triggered. An effect action is notated using the keyword <em>do</em> in the same way as a do action on a state definition or usage. </p><p>To specify effect actions for transitions via the Textual Editor</p><hr /><ol><li>In the Textual Editor, place the cursor between the transition's source and target, after the accepter and guard condition, then declare the <em>do</em> keyword, followed by the needed action.</li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the </span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="136e5013-3003-42ff-b04f-0de8a4323486"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">transition</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">off_on</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">first</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">off</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">accept</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">TurnOn</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">via</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">commPort</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">if</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">isEnabled</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">do</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">action</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">powerUp</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">PowerUp</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">then</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">;  <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// action usage as the <em>do </em>effect action </span></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">transition</span> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on_off</span> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">first</span> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">on</span> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">accept</span> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">TurnOn</span> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">after</span> <span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-green-bolder,#1f845a);">5</span> [<span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">s</span>] <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">if</span> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">isEnabled</span> <u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">do</span> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">send</span> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">TimeoutSignal</span>() <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">via</span> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">commPort</span></u> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">then</span> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">off</span>;  <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// send action usage as the <em>do send </em>effect action</span></span><br /></span></span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p><br /></p>

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=306282555 space=SYSML2P version=4 -->
## PAGE 00735: Updating used projects to their latest versions

- page_id: `306282555`
- space_key: `SYSML2P`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/SYSML2P/pages/306282555/Updating+used+projects+to+their+latest+versions
- version_number: 4
- version_date: `2026-05-08T13:01:40.930+02:00`
- ancestors: SysML v2 Plugin Documentation > Project management > Working with projects > Managing local used projects
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

While a project may be used in the main project, it may be modified and saved to a new version, rendering its version used in the main project outdated. Therefore, in the main project, the used project may refer to two of its available versions: **Older Version**or **Latest Version**. You can choose to update the used project to its latest version or continue using the older one. You can see more details about the used version in the Containment tree, the **Project Usages**dialog, and the **Advanced Project Usages Configuration**dialog.

- Refreshing version information display . To ensure the used project version information displayed in the Containment tree and the rest of the tool is up to date, press F5 or click View > Refresh in the main menu.
- Reverting used project version update . Once you update a used project to its latest version and save the project, reverting to an older version is not possible. However, if you do not save the main project after the update, you can close the main project without saving it to discard all changes, including the used project's version update. Thus, make sure the update is necessary to avoid potential model inconsistencies.
- Updating directly used projects . Updating directly used projects does not update [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Indirectly used projects' space=''] if they are outdated in the projects that use them. In this case, indirectly used projects must be updated individually. However, if the indirectly used project is already updated in the directly used one, then the indirectly used project's version is updated in the main project once you update the directly used project's version.

**[IMAGE alt='' src='']**

###### Updating all used projects to their latest versions

To update all used projects to their latest versions

1. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Managing local used projects' space='']Open the **Project Usages**dialog .
2. In the Project Usages dialog's toolbar, click the Update Used Projects [ATTACHMENT filename='update_used_projects_button.png'] button. The Update Used Projects dialog opens.
3. In the Update Used Projects dialog, select the check box in the Update column for the used projects you want to update and click OK . [ATTACHMENT filename='Updating all used projects to their latest versions.png']
4. Click the OK button to close the Project Usages dialog. The used projects are updated to their latest versions.

###### Updating a used project to its latest version via the Containment tree

To update a used project to its latest version via the Containment tree

- In the Containment tree, expand the Used Projects node, then right-click a used project. In the shortcut menu, click Switch to Latest Version . The used project is updated to its latest version. [ATTACHMENT filename='Updating a used project to its latest version via the Containment tree.png']

###### Updating a used project to its latest version via the Project Usages dialog

To update a used project to its latest version via the Project Usages dialog

1. Open the **Project Usages**dialog and d o one of the following:
  1. In the dialog's toolbar, click the **Change Version** [ATTACHMENT filename='change_version_button.png'] button , and in its dropdown menu, click Switch to Latest Version .
  2. In the dialog's project usages tree, right-click a used project and in the shortcut menu, click the **Change Version > Switch to Latest Version******command.
2. Click the OK button to close the Project Usages dialog. The used project is updated to its latest version. [ATTACHMENT filename='Updating a used project to its latest version via the Project Usages dialog.png']

###### Updating a used project to its latest version via the Advanced Project Usages Configuration dialog

To update a used project to its latest version via the Advanced Project Usages Configuration dialog

1. Open the **Advanced Project Usages Configuration**dialog .
2. In the **Advanced Project Usages Configuration**dialog, do one of the following:
  1. Select a used project and in the dialog's toolbar, click the Change Version [ATTACHMENT filename='change_version_button.png'] button, then in its dropdown menu, click Switch to Latest Version .
  2. Right-click a used project, then in its shortcut menu, select the Change Version > Switch to Latest Version command. The cell in the Action column for the removed used project states ' Switch to <version number> '. [ATTACHMENT filename='Updating a used project to its latest version via the Advanced Usages Configuration dialog.png']
3. (Optional) To undo the action, do one of the following:
  1. In the dialog's toolbar, click the Reset Changes for Selection [ATTACHMENT filename='reset_changes_for_selection_button.png'] button.
  2. Right-click the used project and in the shortcut menu, click the Reset Changes for Selection command.
4. Do one of the following:
  1. To save changes and keep the dialog open, click the Apply button.
  2. To save changes and close the dialog, click the OK button.
  3. To discard changes and close the dialog, click the Cancel button.
5. Click the OK button to close the Project Usages dialog. The used project version is updated.

### EXACT CONFLUENCE STORAGE SOURCE

````html
<p>While a project may be used in the main project, it may be modified and saved to a new version, rendering its version used in the main project outdated. Therefore, in the main project, the used project may refer to two of its available versions: <strong>Older Version </strong>or <strong>Latest Version</strong>. You can choose to update the used project to its latest version or continue using the older one. You can see more details about the used version in the Containment tree, the <strong>Project Usages </strong>dialog, and the <strong>Advanced Project Usages Configuration </strong>dialog.</p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="06bc0bc9-b3b6-43fe-bdfb-e13cba65d352"><ac:rich-text-body><ul><li data-uuid="ea6dae6e-1241-437e-9755-81121c2aa916"><strong>Refreshing version information display</strong>. To ensure the used project version information displayed in the Containment tree and the rest of the tool is up to date, press <strong>F5 </strong>or click <strong>View </strong>&gt; <strong>Refresh</strong> in the main menu.</li><li data-uuid="4d03d5a4-028e-4cbf-89f5-86e01759ce95"><strong>Reverting used project version update</strong>. Once you update a used project to its latest version and save the project, reverting to an older version is <ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="c21f1c83-458c-4809-a027-88554ac59965">not possible.</ac:inline-comment-marker> However, if you do not save the main project after the update, you can close the main project without saving it to discard all changes, including the used project's version update. Thus, make sure the update is necessary to avoid potential model inconsistencies.</li><li data-uuid="67f2ed78-c68e-48cb-9096-7b95161395d9"><strong>Updating directly used projects</strong>. Updating directly used projects does not update <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Indirectly used projects" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[indirectly used projects]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link> if they are outdated in the projects that use them. In this case, indirectly used projects must be updated individually. However, if the indirectly used project is already updated in the directly used one, then the indirectly used project's version is updated in the main project once you update the directly used project's version.</li></ul></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color:var(--ds-icon-accent-lime,#6a9a23);"><strong><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-red-bolder,#c9372c);"><ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="Updating used projects to their latest versions.png" /></ac:image></span></strong></span></p><h4>Updating all used projects to their latest versions</h4><p>To update all used projects to their latest versions</p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="722ee114-ddee-452b-958a-86b9f7ebcec0"><ac:link ac:anchor="Opening the Project Usages dialog"><ri:page ri:content-title="Managing local used projects" /><ac:link-body>Open the <strong>Project Usages </strong>dialog</ac:link-body></ac:link>. </li><li data-uuid="954c7c92-6da9-4ffe-a96b-50ae6cf4eeff">In the <strong>Project Usages </strong>dialog's toolbar, click the <strong>Update Used Projects</strong> <ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="update_used_projects_button.png" /></ac:image> button. The <strong>Update Used Projects </strong>dialog opens.</li><li data-uuid="6aaf82c3-ad73-48b2-8612-631c28bd5066">In the <strong>Update Used Projects </strong>dialog, select the check box in the <strong>Update </strong>column for the used projects you want to update and click <strong>OK</strong>.<br /><ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="Updating all used projects to their latest versions.png" /></ac:image></li><li data-uuid="d4fe78d1-a150-4605-8ff0-227dc74e5b00">Click the <strong>OK </strong>button to close the <strong>Project Usages </strong>dialog.<br />The used projects are updated to their latest versions. </li></ol><h4>Updating a used project to its latest version via the Containment tree</h4><p>To update a used project to its latest version via the Containment tree</p><hr /><ul><li data-uuid="12e9917c-799d-4d4b-bd54-9162f73a7aae">In the Containment tree, expand the<span> </span><strong>Used Projects</strong><span> </span>node, then right-click a used project. In the shortcut menu, click <strong>Switch to Latest Version</strong>.<br />The used project is updated to its latest version. <br /><ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="Updating a used project to its latest version via the Containment tree.png" /></ac:image></li></ul><h4>Updating a used project to its latest version via the Project Usages dialog</h4><p>To update a used project to its latest version via the Project Usages dialog</p><hr /><ol><li><ac:link ac:anchor="Opening the Project Usages dialog"><ac:link-body>Open the <strong>Project Usages </strong>dialog</ac:link-body></ac:link> and d<span>o one of the following:</span><ol><li><span>In the dialog's toolbar, click the <strong>Change Version </strong></span><ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="change_version_button.png" /></ac:image><span> button</span>, and in its dropdown menu, click <strong style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;">Switch to Latest Version</strong>.</li><li><span>In the dialog's project usages tree, right-click a used project and in the shortcut menu, click the <strong>Change Version &gt; Switch to Latest Version</strong><strong> </strong>command.</span></li></ol></li><li data-uuid="28398e39-b9e4-479f-8d6e-6624d22666c2">Click the <strong>OK </strong>button to close the <strong>Project Usages </strong>dialog.<br />The used project is updated to its latest version. <br /><ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="Updating a used project to its latest version via the Project Usages dialog.png" /></ac:image></li></ol><h4>Updating a used project to its latest version via the Advanced Project Usages Configuration dialog</h4><p>To update a used project to its latest version via the Advanced Project Usages Configuration dialog</p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="72c5afea-069e-4bb7-aa15-bcc8fcdc6a41"><ac:link ac:anchor="Opening the Advanced Project Usages Configuration dialog"><ac:link-body>Open the <strong>Advanced Project Usages Configuration </strong>dialog</ac:link-body></ac:link>.</li><li data-uuid="2f766927-1970-4b64-876b-2a737d57871a"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">In the <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><strong>Advanced Project Usages Configuration </strong>dialog</span>, do one of the following:</span><ol><li data-uuid="f6f3f2ec-e633-4825-af34-da3a2c4072be"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Select a used project <span>and in the dialog's toolbar</span>, click the</span> <strong>Change Version</strong> <ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="change_version_button.png" /></ac:image> button, then in its dropdown menu, click <strong>Switch to Latest Version</strong>.</li><li data-uuid="86ccd267-da4d-4d63-8a50-e1e97a448123">Right-click a used project, then in its shortcut menu, select the <strong>Change Version &gt; Switch to Latest Version </strong>command.<br />The cell in the Action column for the removed used project states '<strong>Switch to &lt;version number&gt;</strong>'.  <br /><ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="Updating a used project to its latest version via the Advanced Usages Configuration dialog.png" /></ac:image></li></ol></li><li data-uuid="7026b736-3066-488a-be65-7af1079a9529">(Optional) To undo the action, do one of the following:<ol><li>In the dialog's toolbar, click the <strong>Reset Changes for Selection</strong> <ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="reset_changes_for_selection_button.png" /></ac:image> button.</li><li>Right-click the used project and in the shortcut menu, click the <strong>Reset Changes for Selection </strong>command.</li></ol></li><li data-uuid="c8caea2f-a47e-4c4e-8761-563226cde88c">Do one of the following:<ol><li>To save changes and keep the dialog open, click the <strong>Apply </strong>button.</li><li>To save changes and close the dialog, click the <strong>OK </strong>button.</li><li>To discard changes and close the dialog, click the <strong>Cancel</strong> button.</li></ol></li><li data-uuid="5a7c1339-7724-4150-927d-d16794b7b706">Click the <strong>OK </strong>button to close the <strong>Project Usages </strong>dialog.<br />The used project version is updated. </li></ol>
````
